---
title: "Final Project"
author: "Yasmine Graham"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Libraries 
```{r Libraries}
library(tidytext)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)


```


# 1. Data Loading


```{r DtaLoading}
summary(cars)
```

# 2. Data Cleaning


```{r DtaCleaning}
summary(cars)
```


## Flights
```{r Flights}
summary(cars)
```

## Weather
```{r Weather}
summary(cars)
```

## Tweets



```{r, Tweets}

twitter_data <- read.csv("Tweets-1.csv")

twitter_tibble <- tibble(twitter_data)

twitter_unnested <- twitter_tibble %>%
  unnest_tokens(word,text)

stop_words <- c("like", "work", "right", "well", "enough", "free", "fine", "tough", "afford", "cheaper", "rapid","leverage")
stopwords_tibble <- tibble(word = stop_words)

twitter_sentiment <- twitter_unnested %>%
  inner_join(get_sentiments("bing")) %>%
  anti_join(stopwords_tibble, by="word") %>%
  count(word, sentiment, sort = TRUE)


negative <- twitter_sentiment %>%
  group_by(sentiment) %>%
  filter(sentiment == "negative")

total_negative <- negative %>%
  count(sentiment, sort = TRUE)
  
positive <- twitter_sentiment %>%
  group_by(sentiment) %>%
  filter(sentiment == "positive")

total_positive <- positive %>%
  count(sentiment, sort = TRUE)

write.csv(twitter_sentiment, file = "twitter_sentiment.csv")

```

# 3. Analysis


```{r Analysis}
summary(cars)
```

## Flights Patterns

```{r FlightPatterns}
summary(cars)
```

## Weather Impact
```{r WeatherImpact}
summary(cars)
```

## Sentiment Analysis
```{r SentimentAnalysis}
summary(cars)
```

# 4. Integration
```{r Integration}
summary(cars)
```

# 5. Conclusion
